children.name:
Expect $(`~free-space-current-size`).$(`-ios class chain:**/XCUIElementTypeStaticText[1]`) to have text containing

Expected: "Current Space:"
Received: "Used Space:"
Files - File Size Indicators without files shows GB Max and 0 bytes as current space

Expect $(`[name="free-space-current-size"]`).$(`<Text>[1]`) to have text containing

Expected: "Current Space:"
Received: "Used Space:"
Files - File Size Indicators without files shows GB Max and 0 bytes as current space
